general.name: Oliver Ng
general.headline: Full-Stack Software Engineer | Computer Science @ SFU
about: I build reliable backend and full-stack systems with a focus on performance, scalability, and maintainability. My recent work includes modernizing enterprise Java services, improving API and data pipeline reliability, and shipping production-ready features across cross-functional teams.

I’m currently studying Computing Science at Simon Fraser University and have internship experience in cybersecurity and enterprise modernization. I’m especially interested in distributed systems, microservices architecture, and turning complex requirements into clean engineering solutions.

experiences.title: Full-Stack Developer Co-op
description: Migrated enterprise microservices from Java EE 8 to Jakarta EE 10 and supported adoption of Java 17 across production systems.
Automated the javax-to-jakarta refactor with OpenRewrite and Eclipse Transformer across 500+ legacy files.
Worked with QA, DBA, and systems teams to update WSDL schemas and Maven dependencies while resolving compatibility issues.
Validated service upgrades through integration testing and tooling to catch defects before release.

experiences.title: Software Developer Co-op
description: Developed low-latency C++ packet-processing services for secure monitoring pipelines.
Built REST API and throttling logic to improve reliability under sustained high-throughput workloads.
Implemented Kafka-based event streaming and Python tooling for near real-time analyst visibility.
Improved deployment and diagnostics workflows on Linux through automation and scripting.

projects.name: Library Database Management System
projects.description: BCNF-compliant library platform with normalized schema design, trigger-driven business logic, and secure Flask API workflows.

projects.name: SAM Segmentation Machine
projects.description: Full-stack medical imaging app for lung CT segmentation with asynchronous inference, DICOM preprocessing, and PyTorch integration.

projects.name: Exam Scheduler Web Application
projects.description: Collaborative exam scheduling app with role-based access, availability management, and automated email notifications.
